understanding.goal_understanding: The game required placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+) simultaneously to trigger a win. Each level had one or more selectable pieces and one or more goal tiles. All goals had to be occupied at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. If a pushable block is adjacent in that direction, it is pushed along. Walls block movement and cannot be pushed. Multiple selectable pieces exist; CLICK on another selectable piece's coordinates switches control. The semantic grid uses 'P' for the controlled piece, 'S' for other selectables, 'B' for blocks, '#' for walls, '+' for goals. Running out of steps ends the attempt in failure.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The game required placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+) simultaneously to trigger a win. Each level had one or more selectable pieces and one or more goal tiles. All goals had to be occupied at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. If a pushable block is adjacent in that direction, it is pushed along. Walls block movement and cannot be pushed. Multiple selectable pieces exist; CLICK on another selectable piece's coordinates switches control. The semantic grid uses 'P' for the controlled piece, 'S' for other selectables, 'B' for blocks, '#' for walls, '+' for goals. Running out of steps ends the attempt in failure.
